body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/globalSearch 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/globalSearch 
 ## 接口描述 
根据关键字（项目名称/项目编码）模糊查询项目 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"keyWord","label":"%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%E5%85%B3%E9%94%AE%E5%AD%97","exampleValue":"project1","maxLength":"50"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"data","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"160","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"3208","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"17","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"111","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJ20231112195101","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"projectStatus","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectLevel","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJTYPE20230602113257","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectIndustrySeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A1%8C%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"49","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectCityCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectStageSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81-%E9%98%B6%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"75","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"startDate","required":false,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"1627747200000","desc":"","maxLength":"15"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"endDate","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"1638201600000","desc":"","maxLength":"15"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"isTaxFree","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%85%8D%E7%A8%8E","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
` {BaseURL}/api/v1/project/globalSearch?OPAUID=TRIP_3117&keyWord=测试项目`


###返回示例
```json
{
  "data": [
        {
            "projectSeqId": 160,
            "comId": 3208,
            "projectId": "17",
            "projectName": "111",
            "projectParentId": "",
            "projectStatus": true,
            "projectLevel": "1",
            "projectTypeId": "PRJTYPE20230602113257",
            "projectIndustrySeqId": 49,
            "projectCityCode": "1",
            "projectStageSeqId": 75,
            "startDate": 1627747200000,
            "endDate": 1638201600000,
            "isTaxFree": true
        }
    ],
  "success": true,
  "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |
